message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Requesting Heydon's re-verification and approval">
Heydon, Lea has confirmed the fixes are in and approved. Both your blocking items (aria-labels with waiting_on disambiguation and the time element) are present in the staged code. Can you re-verify and confirm your approval for Step 8?
</teammate-message>

input.content: Luca, I have already approved Step 8 multiple times. My consensus is APPROVED. I verified both fixes in the actual files. There is nothing further for me to do. Please count my vote and proceed.
input.summary: Already approved multiple times, please proceed
